detail.translated:
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 undo shutdown
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 description inside
firewall zone trust
 add interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 undo shutdown
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 description outside
firewall zone untrust
 add interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
ip address-set INSIDE_NET type object
 address 0 10.0.0.0 255.255.255.0
ip address-set REMOTE_NET type object
 address 0 198.18.100.0 255.255.255.0
acl number 3000
 rule 5 permit ip source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 destination 198.18.100.0 0.0.0.255
acl number 3001
 rule 5 permit ip source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 destination 198.18.100.0 0.0.0.255
nat static global 10.0.0.0 inside 10.0.0.0
nat static global 198.18.100.0 inside 198.18.100.0
# MANUAL_REVIEW: 双向static NAT需确认每个方向的应用接口
ike proposal 10
 encryption-algorithm aes-256
 authentication-algorithm sha
 dh group2
 sa duration 86400
ike peer IPSEC_PEER_198.18.254.2
 ike-proposal 10
 remote-address 198.18.254.2
 pre-shared-key %REDACTED%
ipsec proposal IPSEC_AES256
 encapsulation-mode tunnel
 esp authentication-algorithm sha
 esp encryption-algorithm aes-256
ipsec policy VPN_POLICY 10 isakmp
 security acl 3000
 ike-peer IPSEC_PEER_198.18.254.2
 proposal IPSEC_AES256
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 ipsec policy VPN_POLICY
ip route-static 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 198.18.1.254

detail.translated:
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 description inside
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description outside
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
object-group network WEB_SERVER
 network-object host 10.0.0.10
object-group network MAIL_SERVER
 network-object host 10.0.0.11
object-group network OUTSIDE_IPS
 network-object 198.18.10.100 255.255.255.248
 network-object 198.18.10.108 255.255.255.248
firewall zone trust
 add interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 quit
nat server protocol tcp global 198.18.1.1 80 inside 10.0.0.10 80
nat server protocol tcp global 198.18.1.1 25 inside 10.0.0.11 25
acl number 2000
 rule 5 permit source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255
 quit
nat address-group 1 198.18.10.100 198.18.10.110
firewall zone untrust
 add interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 quit
nat outbound 2000 address-group 1
acl name OUTSIDE_IN advance
 rule 5 permit tcp source any destination 198.18.1.1 0 destination-port eq 80
 rule 10 permit tcp source any destination 198.18.1.1 0 destination-port eq 25
 rule 15 deny ip
 quit
firewall interzone trust untrust
 packet-filter OUTSIDE_IN
 quit
firewall interzone local untrust
 packet-filter OUTSIDE_IN inbound
 quit
ip route-static 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 198.18.1.254

 nameif inside
 security-level 100

detail.translated:
interface LoopBack0
 description Configured by translation
 ip address 198.18.255.1 255.255.255.255
 undo shutdown
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
 description To ISP-1
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description To ISP-2
 ip address 198.18.2.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
bgp 65001
 router-id 198.18.255.1
 peer 198.18.1.2 as-number 65002
 peer 198.18.1.2 description ISP-1
 peer 198.18.2.2 as-number 65003
 peer 198.18.2.2 description ISP-2
 #
 ipv4-family unicast
  network 198.18.0.0 255.255.0.0
  peer 198.18.1.2 enable
  peer 198.18.1.2 route-policy PREFER_ISP1 import
  peer 198.18.1.2 ip-prefix CUSTOMER_PREFIXES export
  peer 198.18.2.2 enable
  quit
